Queue telemetry is stable enough that repeated supervisor-core review loops are lower leverage than a named triage owner with a runbook.
Partial file-by-file reflection between workspace and live runtime is unsafe because the live side still depends on an older contract surface.

Routine heartbeat and scorecard output is still drifting toward narrative review; the stable pattern is signal_only for routine runs and agenda_candidate only for anomalies, deltas, and precedent gaps.

24h snapshot shows 2 heartbeat runs, candidate_rate 0.5, candidate_to_board_touch_ratio 2.0, board_touch_high warning, and exploration_drift_risk=true while board_overload/scout_saturation/duplicate_spike remain false.

定常時の board / heartbeat / scorecard は digest に固定し、candidate 化は anomaly delta があるときだけに絞る。

reporting.board_summary: Board-auditor reviewed 2 INBOX proposals: (1) handoff-preflight-lowrisk - APPROVED/assisted (docs-only split from blocked boundary proposal), (2) board-artifact-freshness-governance - APPROVED/assisted (publish gate freshness validation). Remaining INBOX: token-management (revise), claude-code-connection (medium risk, deferred).
reporting.adopted_summary: 2 low-risk governance/docs proposals approved with assisted apply mode.
reporting.deferred_summary: token-management-system-optimization (already revise, affects core runtime), claude-code-connection (medium risk, affects BOOT.md configs)

accepted_because: seed-operations-standardization is low-risk: docs/pipeline only, no protected path changes, fully reversible
supervisor-separation-queue-triage-analyst is medium-low risk: role separation only, no auth/trust changes, well-evidenced from multiple sources

constraints: No auth, routing, or trust boundary changes
supervisor-core routing root must remain unchanged
queue triage analyst limited to triage-only
forbidden_actions: changes to supervisor-core authority or routing root
expansion beyond documented scope during implementation

reopen_condition: operational metrics worsen
boundary confusion during implementation
user complaint

reporting.board_summary: Board-auditor reviewed 2 INBOX proposals: (1) seed-operations-standardization - APPROVED/assisted (low-risk board input pipeline standardization), (2) supervisor-separation-queue-triage-analyst - APPROVED/assisted (medium-low risk role separation with guardrails). Both fully reversible, no protected path impact.
reporting.adopted_summary: 2 proposals approved with assisted apply mode: board input pipeline standardization and supervisor-core/queue-triage-analyst role separation.
